x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: AI Agents orchestrate all automation through Flow Designer subflows. Instances with no active flows cannot leverage Agentic AI for process automation regardless of other configurations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Create Flow Designer flows for key ITSM and ITOM processes via sys_hub_flow_list.do. Migrate legacy Workflow Engine processes to Flow Designer subflows. Target: 10+ active flows. AI Agents exclusively use Flow Designer for orchestration.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851ceb
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[AI Agents orchestrate all automation through Flow Designer subflows. Instances with no active flows cannot leverage Agentic AI for process automation regardless of other configurations.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Flow Designer Active Flows</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_hub_flow');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active Flow Designer flows';

    if (count >= 10) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active Flow Designer flows. AI Agents have a strong orchestration foundation — Flow Designer is the exclusive execution layer for AI Agent automation.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 3) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active Flow Designer flows (target: 10+). Limited flow coverage restricts AI Agent operational scope — migrate legacy Workflow Engine processes to Flow Designer.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active Flow Designer flows. AI Agents exclusively orchestrate through Flow Designer — without flows, AI Agent automation cannot execute.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>PLATFORM</module>
<number>CHK0006107</number>
<order>30</order>
<remediation_guidance>Create Flow Designer flows for key ITSM and ITOM processes via sys_hub_flow_list.do. Migrate legacy Workflow Engine processes to Flow Designer subflows. Target: 10+ active flows. AI Agents exclusively use Flow Designer for orchestration.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851ceb</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
